subject: Re: Fwd: vacation days requested by Peg
body:
ok

Subject: Fwd: vacation days requested by Peg


Please advise.
 
Darren K. Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
4th Floor
New York, New York 10022

Fax: 212-750-0381
e-mail: dkiesq@aol.com

Darren,
If it is not a problem, I would like to take 3 more vacation days:  Friday, 
Monday and Tuesday.  My sister is coming and I would like to spend some 
time with her.  I will have my cell phone so you can reach me any 
time.  Also, if you need me in the office, you can call me and I will drive in.
Thanks.
Peg
